title: Administrative Procedure v2
description: Root model for a national administrative procedure definition. This is the catalog schema — the design-time source of truth for a procedure's identity, workflow, fee, and document requirements. Linked to satellite schemas (form-definition, execution-mapping) by serviceId.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of the catalog schema used to produce this record (e.g. '2.0.0'). Consumers MUST validate this against the schema version they support.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this record was generated or last normalized. Used for traceability and cache invalidation.

serviceId.description: Unique identifier of this procedure across the catalog. Acts as the cross-schema linking key: satellite schemas (form-definition, execution-mapping) reference the same serviceId. Convention: MINISTRY-DOMAIN-NNN (e.g. 'MID-AUTH-001').

name.description: Official name of the administrative procedure as defined by the owning institution. MUST be the canonical designation, not a portal-friendly abbreviation.

description.description: Free-text description of the procedure's purpose and scope, suitable for display in a portal. MAY include eligibility context.

type.description: Procedure type classification (e.g. 'autorisation', 'attestation', 'enregistrement'). Used for analytics and portal filtering. No controlled vocabulary enforced at schema level.

status.description: Lifecycle status of this procedure definition. 'active': in use and publishable if quality gates pass. 'draft': under preparation, not publishable. 'deprecated': replaced or withdrawn. 'unknown': status could not be determined during normalization.

owner.description: Institutional ownership of this procedure. Identifies which ministry and sub-unit is responsible for defining and maintaining the procedure.

ministry.description: Short code or full name of the owning ministry (e.g. 'MID', 'Ministère de l'Intérieur').

entity.description: Autonomous entity or agency under the ministry responsible for this procedure (e.g. 'Office du Tourisme').

directorate.description: Directorate within the ministry or entity that owns this procedure.

serviceUnit.description: Specific service unit or department within the directorate.

department.description: Geographic or administrative department where this procedure applies, if geographically scoped. Null for nationally applicable procedures.

audience.description: Target audience for this procedure (e.g. 'Particuliers', 'Entreprises', 'Associations'). Free text — used for portal display and filtering.

eligibility.description: Free-text description of eligibility conditions that applicants must meet. Not machine-evaluated at catalog level; used for portal display.

languages.description: BCP 47 language codes in which this procedure is available (e.g. ['fr', 'mg']). Indicates available languages, not translated content.

tags.description: Free-form classification tags for portal search and filtering (e.g. ['identité', 'carte', 'urgent']).

url.description: Canonical URL of the procedure's official page or portal entry point.

access.description: Describes how and where the procedure can be accessed by applicants.

channel.description: Primary access channel. 'offline': physical presence required. 'online': fully digital. 'hybrid': mix of both. 'unknown': could not be determined.

submissionPoints.description: List of physical or digital locations where the application can be submitted (e.g. 'Commune de résidence', 'portail.gov.mg').

processingTime.description: Indicative processing time for this procedure from submission to decision.

slaDays.description: Regulatory or declared SLA in working days. Used as the reference for delay analytics. Null if not officially declared.

rawText.description: Original processing time text as extracted from the source (e.g. '15 jours ouvrables à compter de la réception du dossier complet'). Preserved for traceability.

documentsRequired.description: List of documents that the applicant must submit. Each entry references document-requirement.schema.json. An empty array indicates no documents are required.

fee.description: Fee structure for this procedure. Always present; use model='unknown' and an empty rules array if cost information is unavailable.

workflow.description: Workflow definition for this procedure. Defines the ordered sequence of steps from submission to delivery. Always present.

metrics.description: Computed quality and friction indicators for this procedure. Populated by the normalization pipeline; not submitted by institutions.

frictionScore.description: Composite score indicating the relative burden imposed on applicants. Higher values indicate more friction. Derived from step count, manual step share, and document count.

documentsCount.description: Total number of required documents (length of documentsRequired array). Denormalized for analytics queries.

manualRequiredShare.description: Proportion of workflow steps flagged as manual_required (0.0 to 1.0). A value of 1.0 means all steps require human intervention.

supportContact.description: Contact information for applicants who need assistance with this procedure.

phone.description: Phone number of the support desk or service unit.

officeAddress.description: Physical address of the office handling this procedure.
